extra.reason: AppHeader.jsx patched (onLogout now optional, logout block conditional); package.json version left untouched since publish-ui-kit.yml bumps it itself via workflow_dispatch. Awaiting user commit+push+publish trigger.
Vite+React+TS scaffold built and verified (npm install + npm run build clean).
App.tsx renders AppProviders+AppShell+AppHeader with no LoginScreen/onLogout, verified no Logout button appears with ui-kit 0.1.9.
UrlBar with Go/Refresh, presets, ?url= sync, and HEAD-based 500MB warning modal implemented and verified via Playwright.
epgParser.worker.ts: streaming fetch, native gzip DecompressionStream, byte-level tag scanner, OPFS sync-access-handle storage with in-memory fallback. Verified end-to-end.
epgStore (zustand) wired with cancelLoad() unloading prior source/worker before every new load.
GuideGrid.tsx: TanStack Virtual row virtualization + windowed horizontal programme rendering, sticky channel column/time ruler. Verified visually.
XmlInspector.tsx: CodeMirror 6 read-only + xml() + lint, DOMParser well-formedness badge. Verified well-formed and syntax-error paths both render correctly.
EpgHeaderInfo.tsx parses and displays <tv generator-info-name/-url>. Verified against a real header string.
deploy.yml (build+deploy-pages), sw.js with commit-hash cache busting, manifest.webmanifest, Footer.tsx update-check pill all implemented.
Upload button + hidden file input feed File.stream() into the same worker pipeline via a new 'load-file' message type. Verified end-to-end incl. ?url= param clearing.
proxy/worker.js (Cloudflare Worker, SSRF-guarded) + wrangler.toml + README; app Settings menu stores proxy URL in localStorage, worker retries through it on direct-fetch failure.
Fixed a real CSP/urlValidation mismatch found during testing: CSP only allowed https: for connect-src/img-src while urlValidation.ts accepts http: too. CSP now matches (http: + https:).
Bumped to Node 22, removed cache: npm (no committed lockfile to key against).
Added src/lib/codeMirrorTheme.ts (Mantine-CSS-var-based dark theme + syntax highlight style reusing dataviz-validated dark categorical hexes), wired into XmlInspector.tsx extensions.

Upload is now the primary action; URL bar/Go/Refresh/Presets collapsed behind a toggle (auto-opens if ?url= present). Settings moved into AppHeader's actions prop as a Modal (no ui-kit change needed). New StatusArea.tsx renders progress/error in its own block, no longer inline in the controls Group.
Verified via Playwright: date/hour ruler, live now-line (auto-scroll to now-30min confirmed working), category-colored left-border stripes, sub-title display, all rendering correctly.

Settings now has a source-mode SegmentedControl (Upload/Direct URL) with a reactive zustand+persist settingsStore; SourceBar.tsx renders the matching control in the main toolbar; EmptyState.tsx shows a big Upload CTA or a URL hint depending on mode.

StatusArea's loading/checking indicator is now a clickable UnstyledButton calling cancelLoad(), which resets status/progress. Added a loadGeneration token in epgStore so an in-flight HEAD request can't resurrect a cancelled load.
ProgrammeCell background is now hexToRgba(color, 0.18) instead of flat neutral; border-left stays solid full-opacity. Removed CategoryLegend component and its usage entirely.

InspectTarget is now a discriminated union carrying full ChannelEntry/ProgrammeEntry+channelName+channelIcon. XmlInspector shows a rich header (logo/thumbnail, title, sub-title, category badge, formatted time range, channel name) with badges, and raw XML moves behind a 'Show XML source' toggle. Fixed a real bug found in testing: CodeMirror was mounting inside a Mantine Collapse while still zero-height, so it never rendered visibly — removed the Collapse wrapper since the effect already gates mount/unmount on sourceOpen.

Padded the 512x436 source logo onto a transparent 512x512 canvas (avoids the generator's plain resize stretching it), then ran sethwv-plugins-dev/scripts/generate-pwa-icons.py against epg-viewer/public. Fixed index.html/manifest.webmanifest which referenced icon.svg/favicon-32.png/apple-touch-icon.png (leftover from an earlier mismatched convention) to point at the actual generated logo.png/icon-192.png/icon-512.png. Verified the logo renders correctly in the app header.
Regenerated icon-192/icon-512 with --scale 0.65, matching multiview's ~60-65% fill proportions. logo.png (favicon) unaffected.
Added desc field to ProgrammeEntry, extracted via extractFirstElementText in both emitComplete/emitMalformed, rendered as a dimmed paragraph in the inspector info section.
Added Divider between the info header and the badges row, moved the Show XML source toggle inline with the badges (ml=auto), consistent gap='lg' spacing.

SourceBar now returns null in upload mode when status !== 'ready', since EmptyState already shows the big Upload CTA in that case. The small swap-file icon button only appears once a source is actually loaded.

SearchBox (debounced 200ms) actually filters the grid now: non-matching channel rows are dropped from the virtualizer entirely, and within a matching channel only its matching programmes render. HighlightText wraps the matched substring in <mark>. Match count ('X matching channels / Y matching programmes') moved into the corner cell instead of a separate row. Date labels are now sticky per-calendar-day (nested position:sticky within each day's own absolutely-positioned box) so the current date stays pinned while scrolling through it. Also fixed a real React warning found in testing: ProgrammeCell was mixing the 'border' shorthand with a 'borderLeft' longhand override, which trips a DOM style-conflict warning on rerender — switched to explicit longhand properties throughout.

Removed the per-programme query filter from visibleProgrammes() in GuideGrid.tsx — search now only decides which channel rows appear (via matchingChannelIds), and once a channel is shown all of its programmes render, highlighted where they individually match. Confirmed root cause first by running the real, unmodified tokenizer against the actual 603MB epg.guru Canada feed outside the app — parsing was correct (CKCO's channel + all 230 programmes indexed fine), so the bug was isolated to grid-level search filtering, not data loss. Verified fix with Playwright: channel-name-only match now shows all its programmes; programme-title match still shows the rest of that channel's programmes too; non-matching channels stay excluded.

Root cause was overflow:hidden on the day-wrapper becoming the sticky element's own scroll-reference container per the CSS Overflow spec, defeating stickiness entirely (it just scrolled normally with the page). Removed overflow:hidden from the day-wrapper and offset the sticky label's left to CHANNEL_COL_WIDTH (sticky position is relative to the true scrollport edge, not the immediate parent, so left:0 would sit behind the sticky channel column). Verified with an incremental-scroll diagnostic: date label now stays pinned at a constant x position through a day, then correctly hands off to the next day's label right at the boundary.
Corner box now splits into two stacked rows (DATE_ROW_HEIGHT/HOUR_ROW_HEIGHT) with the same border-bottom divider style as the ruler's date/hour split.
Split the combined 'id · gnid' line into two separate Text lines in both ChannelCell.tsx and XmlInspector.tsx, still skipping gnid when missing or identical to id.

Columnar rewrite complete: fieldExtraction.ts + columnar.ts + tokenizer.ts as pure boundary scanner + types.ts updated; verified against real 603MB Canada.xml.gz feed with exact channel/programme counts, correct CKCO fields, zero unresolved channel refs.

Coordinator + parser-pool implemented (epgParser.worker.ts + xmltvSegmentParser.worker.ts). Fixed two O(n^2) bugs found during real-feed testing: per-element buffer slicing, and unbounded re-search for an absent pattern. Verified: 603MB feed loads in ~10s with all 36 segments processed correctly in parallel, no crash.
Added ParserMemoryWarningMessage + epgStore.memoryWarningBytes + StatusArea display, threshold 1.5GB decompressed.

Fixed: coordinator now maintains a contiguous rolling raw-byte buffer (rawBuf, pre-allocated/doubling, compacted via copyWithin per segment flush to avoid O(n^2)) and slices segments as one contiguous span from first-element-start to last-element-end, preserving inter-element whitespace so local-to-absolute offset math stays correct. Verified via Playwright against the real app: clicked 8 programme cells plus the second channel (not just the first entries), all show well-formed, correctly-terminated XML.
